# Security & Copyright

## Reporting vulnerabilities

Report security issues privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/Taibur-Rahaman/Agent2Wp/security/advisories/new) or by opening a confidential issue if advisories are unavailable.

## Copyright violations

If you find unauthorized copies of Agent2Wp (mirrors, rebranded forks, commercial misuse), please report them:

https://github.com/Taibur-Rahaman/Agent2Wp/issues

See [COPYRIGHT.md](../COPYRIGHT.md) for full usage restrictions.
